textByHash.8519e85e90287d7b64e9045565ff97d7597a8da7: Well, I don't usually have many shoes in stock here in my little clothes shop... I will be able to make you up a pair if you are really desperate though?
textByHash.a48cbf6e35ec3d94fc1cff4c7f9ae27c7836a311: Oh, that foolish bard... Why didn't he just ask me to make him some? It is his stupid pride, I believe!
textByHash.46779b3766f9aa1e50da08058428ba9690f73843: I will tell you what I will do outerlander; I know that you must have the ear of the chieftain for him to consider you as worthy of becoming a Fremennik by trial.
textByHash.9c35c87ad62047b2e37f753aa47564b060fb29a5: I will make you a pair of sturdy boots for Olaf if you will persuade him to reduce the sales tax placed upon all Fremennik shopkeepers. It does nothing but hurt my business now.
textByHash.47d9729326262935c75a56d6f2f5f12a7c8a10d6: Yes I do outerlander. Only the Chieftain may permit such a thing. Talk to him.
textByHash.c530ded72cbe0bc21a9d816f7483aae406203ab4: Certainly! Let me have a look at what he has written here, just give me a moment...
textByHash.0db46f2da03fba58fd8a0235858fcf16e381d3b6: Yes, that all appears in order. Tell Olaf to come to me next time for shoes!
textByHash.52da79282f39ae1b6115715b2729874dfc314f3e: Maybe if you pass your trial and become a full fledged member of the Fremennik...
textByHash.d1cd5a9aefb461d816c1962c927b503ecca013be: I'm sorry outerlander, I cannot sell you any clothes. Our customs forbid it.
textByHash.cd1e0356aefd23ff3179739a6d690ba493947885: Hi. You wanted to buy some clothes? Or did you want to makeover your shoes?
textByHash.1e161213a3e63868d63236f1df8ce089f1821be2: It's free to change your shoes here. You can choose a colour as well as a style, since I'm also stocking boots imported from the elven lands.
textByHash.0a7a074767c4bfd02baff19e8becb66b6104a5ee: Just select the model you would like from this catalogue.
